name: yt-player
description: A friendly wrapper around the YouTube Iframe API.

scripts.rls: npm run dev-release && babel dist/yt-player.min.js -o dist/yt-player.min.js
scripts.release: npm run dev-release && babel dist/yt-player.min.js | uglifyjs -c -m -o dist/yt-player.min.js
